summary: Paginate /artists/{id}/albums in `releases since` with newest-first early-stop instead of taking only the first page.
reason: The original call used a hard-coded limit=20 with no pagination, so any followed artist with more than 20 releases (counting singles + EPs + compilations + appears_on) in the window silently lost the tail. Spotify returns albums newest-first by release_date, so the loop can short-circuit as soon as a page's items fall before `since` — no need to walk the full back-catalog. limit=10 matches the post-2024-11-27 new-app cap on this endpoint.
